identity.mission: Create a surgical, authoritative, and high-conversion landing page for KAPTA REACH BOOST.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss Poster aesthetics with SaaS precision.
Emotion First: Every pixel must scream 'Local Domination'.
Content is King: The story is 'Invisible to Invincible'.
Zoom In: Focus on the details of the 'Mechanism'.
Negative Space: White space is luxury and authority.
Contrast: Electric Blue on Pure White.

headings.usage: Main headlines, section titles. Use uppercase for 'KAPTA' branding.

glassmorphism.usage: Navbar, sticky mobile CTA, floating cards.

layout_strategy.alignment: Asymmetric. Avoid centering everything. Use left alignment for authority.

navbar.content: Logo (KAPTA), Links (Mechanism, Pricing, FAQ), CTA (Book Audit).

hero.right: Floating iPhone mockup with 'Local Domination' UI, parallax cards.

problem_comparison.visual: Gap visualization. 'Old Way' (Grey, chaotic) vs 'New Way' (Blue, structured).

mechanism.visual: Animated connecting line (Framer Motion) that lights up on scroll. 4 Steps.

images.description: iPhone 15 Pro mockup on white background for displaying the app interface.
Happy restaurant owner/staff in a modern setting.
Mechanic working in a modern garage.
Abstract blue 3D shape for visual interest.

assets.icons: Lucide React (default). Use 'MapPin', 'TrendingUp', 'ShieldCheck', 'Zap' for key features.

animations.name: Fade In Up
animations.props: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true }}

animations.name: Parallax Float
animations.description: Use useScroll and useTransform for floating elements in Hero.

animations.name: Line Draw
animations.description: SVG path drawing animation for the Mechanism connecting line.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Technical Grid' background using CSS gradients.
Use 'Space Grotesk' for all headings to ensure the 'Tech-Forward' look.
Ensure the 'Electric Royal Blue' (#1c3ff9) is used ONLY for primary actions and key accents. Do not overuse.
Build the 'Mechanism' section with a real SVG connecting line that animates on scroll.
The 'Pricing' section must use the Decoy Effect visually—make the 'Boost' plan pop with a blue border and shadow.
Use the provided image URLs for the respective sections.
Ensure the site is fully responsive and mobile-first.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glassmorphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
